list.fileNotCreated: The file could not be created
list.fileNotImported: The file could not be imported
list.invalidFile: Invalid File (It must be a .csv file)
list.fileImported:
{amount} Redirects where imported.
{skipped} Redirects where not imported because they already existed and should not be overridden
list.fileImportedError:
{amount} Redirects where imported.
{skipped} Redirects where not imported because they already existed and should not be overridden.

list.searchIapRequired: Searching redirects is part of the premium extension. Please unlock the in-app purchase to use search.

notFound.title: 404 Log
notFound.detailsNoSources: No sources have been recorded for this entry yet.

bulkDeleteModal.title: Delete entries?
bulkDeleteModal.message: Do you really want to delete the selected entry? This action cannot be undone. | Do you really want to delete the {count} selected entries? This action cannot be undone.

bulk.title: Create redirects for multiple 404 entries
bulk.summary: {count} entry will be redirected to the same target. | {count} entries will be redirected to the same target.
bulk.salesChannelHelpText: If empty, the sales channel of each 404 entry is used.
bulk.warningSkipped: {count} entry was skipped (source empty or identical to target). | {count} entries were skipped (source empty or identical to target).

notFound.iapTeaser: Logging and managing 404 errors is part of the premium extension. Unlock the in-app purchase to use this feature.

modal.title: Create redirect from 404 error
modal.seoUrlHelpText: The SEO URL was automatically loaded from the selected item. You can adjust it manually.
modal.noSeoUrlFound: No SEO URL found for this item. Please enter the target URL manually.
modal.errorEmptyFields: Source URL and target URL must not be empty

notFoundConfig.iapRequired: This feature requires the Premium In-App Purchase.
notFoundConfig.cleanupEnabledLabel: Enable automatic cleanup of 404 log entries
notFoundConfig.retentionDaysHelpText: Entries older than this value (based on last hit) are deleted by the scheduled task. Ignored entries and entries linked to a redirect are kept.
notFoundConfig.refererModeHelpText: Controls how much of the referer URL is stored. From a GDPR perspective, 'Origin + path' is the recommended default, since query parameters (search terms, tokens) are discarded.
notFoundConfig.ignorePatternsHelpText: One pattern per line. Glob syntax: * = any characters, ? = one character, [abc] = character class. Matches are neither logged nor counted.

autoRedirectDelete.helpText: When a product with an existing SEO URL is deleted, a redirect to the homepage is automatically created. Variants are included. The redirect persists after deletion and restoring the product will not remove it automatically.
autoRedirectDelete.iapRequired: This feature requires the Premium In-App Purchase.

autoRedirect.helpText: When a product with an existing SEO URL is deactivated, a 302 redirect to the homepage is automatically created. When the product is reactivated, the redirect is automatically removed.
autoRedirect.iapRequired: This feature requires the Premium In-App Purchase.

deleteModal.title: Delete automatic redirects?
deleteModal.message: Would you like to delete all automatically created redirects? This action cannot be undone.

detail.autoCreatedInfo: This redirect was automatically created for the product:

queryParamsHandlingValues.transfer: Ignore Query Parameters during search and add them to the target URL

danglingEntity.product: The linked product no longer exists. This redirect is currently broken.
danglingEntity.category: The linked category no longer exists. This redirect is currently broken.

detail.errorSameUrlDescription: The source URL and target URL must not be the same
detail.errorEmptySourceURL: The source URL mustn't be empty
detail.errorEmptyTargetURL: The target URL mustn't be empty
